mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_memory_processed_cursor (session_id, user_id, last_chat_memory_id, last_obsolete_memory_id, update_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{lastChatMemoryId}, #{lastObsoleteMemoryId}, datetime('now', 'localtime')) ON CONFLICT(session_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET last_chat_memory_id = MAX(COALESCE(chat_memory_processed_cursor.last_chat_memory_id, 0), COALESCE(excluded.last_chat_memory_id, 0)), last_obsolete_memory_id = MAX(COALESCE(chat_memory_processed_cursor.last_obsolete_memory_id, 0), COALESCE(excluded.last_obsolete_memory_id, 0)), update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime')
